# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  Network:
    type: gcp-typescompute-v1:networks
    properties:
      name: our-three-tier-app-network
      autoCreateSubnets: true
  Subnet1:
    type: gcp-typescompute-v1:sub networks
    properties:
      name: our-three-tier-app-subnet-1
      network: $(resources.Network.selfLink)
      ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24
  Subnet2:
    type: gcp-typescompute-v1:sub networks
    properties:
      name: our-three-tier-app-subnet-2
      network: $(resources.Network.selfLink)
      ipCidrRange: 10.0.2.0/24
  Subnet3:
    type: gcp-typescompute-v1:sub networks
    properties:
      name: our-three-tier-app-subnet-3
      network: $(resources.Network.selfLink)
      ipCidrRange: 10.0.3.0/24
